title: campanula gracillima
intro: Campanula gracillima, also known as the delicate bellflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Campanula gracillima include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
